# transform_to_summarised_result { #cdmconnector.transform_to_summarised_result }

```python
transform_to_summarised_result(
    x,
    *,
    result_type='custom',
    package_name='cdmconnector',
)
```

Convert an arbitrary DataFrame to a SummarisedResult.

Adds missing required columns with default values ("overall").

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type             | Description                | Default          |
|--------------|------------------|----------------------------|------------------|
| x            | pandas.DataFrame | Input data.                | _required_       |
| result_type  | str              | Result type for settings.  | `'custom'`       |
| package_name | str              | Package name for settings. | `'cdmconnector'` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
